given: Stock records exist in the database (created via S1)
when: User navigates to the stock home page
then: A table is displayed showing all current stock records
architectural_notes: Exercises the full read path UI + boundary + service + repository + DB: the home route (app/routes/) calls a stock-listing service (app/services/) backed by a list query in app/repositories/ (the only ORM layer) and renders the table. E2E because it asserts both rendered UI and seeded DB state. Cross-cutting: persistence read owned by the repository; no business rule in the boundary or template.
